risks: Keine H2H-Daten vorhanden, daher erhöhte Unsicherheit im direkten Vergleich

keyFactors: Ivory Coast has a stronger recent form and weighted form compared to Ecuador.
Ivory Coast's offensive strength is higher, with a goals for average of 2.068 compared to Ecuador's 0.9.
Both teams have similar defensive records, but Ivory Coast has a slightly higher clean sheet rate.
The match being played at a neutral venue reduces any potential home advantage.
risks: Lack of direct head-to-head matches makes comparative performance harder to gauge.
Potential tactical innovations or changes by Ecuador's coach that could impact match dynamics.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Ivory Coast mit deutlich stärkerer gewichteter Form (2.27 vs 1.48) und höherer Offensivproduktion (2.07 vs 0.90 Tore/Spiel); Ähnliche Elo-Werte (CIV 1753 vs ECU 1747) bei neutralem Spielort relativieren den nominellen Heimvorteil; Beide Teams defensiv solide: niedrige Gegentorschnitte (0.56 vs 0.53) und hohe Clean-Sheet-Raten (0.55 vs 0.52).
